mapper.select: SELECT B.STATENAME , A.CURRENCY , A.DATETIME , A.BUYRATE , A.TTBUYRATE , A.TTSALERATE , A.CASHBUYRATE , A.CASHSALERATE , A.USCHANGERATE , A.YYCHANGERATE , TRUNC(((((DOUBLE(A.TTBUYRATE) + DOUBLE(A.TTSALERATE)) / 2) * 100) / 100), 2) AS TMP_RATE FROM DB2INST.EXCHANGE100 A , DB2INST.STATE B WHERE A.CURRENCY = B.CURRENCY AND A.DATETIME = ( SELECT DATETIME FROM DB2INST.EXCHANGE100 GROUP BY DATETIME ORDER BY DATETIME DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) ORDER BY STATENO WITH UR
